zh.siteSubtitle: 时轮金刚·伏藏·诸仁波切
zh.homeIntro1: 藏传佛教中存在大量关于末法时代（Dharma-ending age）的预言，散见于《时轮金刚密续》（Kalachakra Tantra）、莲花生大士（Padmasambhava）的伏藏（terma）文献，以及历代仁波切与活佛的口传教授。这些预言描述了正法衰退、众生苦难加剧的末世景象。
zh.homeIntro2: 其中最核心的预言体系来自《时轮金刚密续》，约成书于公元800-1000年间。该密续预言了香巴拉（Shambhala）王国的勇士将在末法时代与蛮族大军展开最终之战，恢复正法。莲花生大士则在8世纪留下了大量伏藏预言，预见了藏地未来千年的兴衰。
zh.homeIntro3: 20世纪以来，敦珠仁波切（Dudjom Rinpoche）、秋吉林巴（Chögyam Trungpa）等当代大师也留下了关于末法时代的警示性预言。本站汇集了藏传佛教不同来源的14条末法预言，并对可验证的预言进行了现实评估。
zh.coreQuote: 「当铁鸟飞翔、铁马奔驰之时，藏人将如蚂蚁般流散世界各地，佛法将传入红人之地。」——莲花生大士
keyPointsList: 约800年 —— 《时轮金刚密续》在印度成文，末法预言体系形成
8世纪 —— 莲花生大士入藏弘法，埋藏伏藏预言
1959年 —— 藏人流亡，「铁鸟飞翔」预言应验
21世纪 —— 末法五浊恶世征兆加剧
约2424年 —— 时轮金刚预言中香巴拉大战的预估时间
sourceList: 《时轮金刚密续》预言内容参考学术译本与藏学研究（Wikipedia: Kalachakra）
莲花生大士伏藏预言参考公开流通的伏藏文献（Wikipedia: Padmasambhava）
敦珠仁波切预言参考其公开开示与弟子记录（Wikipedia: Dudjom Rinpoche）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道和历史记录
编者观点不代表学术定论
站点图标采用金刚杵（vajra/dorje）符号——金刚杵是藏传佛教最核心的法器，象征不可摧毁的智慧与慈悲

en.homeIntro1: Tibetan Buddhism contains numerous prophecies about the Dharma-ending age, found across the Kalachakra Tantra, Padmasambhava's terma (hidden treasure) texts, and oral teachings of various rinpoches and tulkus. These prophecies describe a world where the Dharma declines and suffering intensifies.
en.homeIntro2: The most central prophetic system comes from the Kalachakra Tantra, composed around 800-1000 CE. It prophesies that warriors of the Shambhala kingdom will fight a final battle against barbarian forces in the end times, restoring the Dharma. Padmasambhava left numerous terma prophecies in the 8th century, foreseeing a millennium of Tibet's rise and fall.
en.homeIntro3: In the 20th century, contemporary masters such as Dudjom Rinpoche and Chögyam Trungpa also left cautionary prophecies about the end of the Dharma age. This site collects 14 end-of-Dharma prophecies from various Tibetan Buddhist sources and evaluates those that can be verified against reality.
en.coreQuote: "When the iron bird flies and horses run on wheels, the Tibetan people will be scattered like ants across the world, and the Dharma will come to the land of the red-faced people." — Padmasambhava
keyPointsList: c. 800 CE —— Kalachakra Tantra composed in India, end-of-Dharma prophecy system formed
8th century —— Padmasambhava enters Tibet, conceals terma prophecies
1959 —— Tibetan exile fulfills the 'iron bird' prophecy
21st century —— Signs of the Five Degenerations intensify
c. 2424 —— Estimated time of the Great Shambhala War in Kalachakra prophecy
sourceList: Kalachakra Tantra prophecies referenced from academic translations and Tibetological research (Wikipedia: Kalachakra)
Padmasambhava terma prophecies referenced from publicly circulated terma literature (Wikipedia: Padmasambhava)
Dudjom Rinpoche prophecies referenced from public teachings and disciple records (Wikipedia: Dudjom Rinpoche)
Verification based on public news reports and historical records
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
Site icon: vajra (dorje) symbol — the vajra is the most central ritual implement in Tibetan Buddhism, symbolizing indestructible wisdom and compassion
